name: artemisinin b
summary: Artemisia metabolite associated with redox-related signaling.
description: Artemisinin B is associated with redox-active stress signaling; may generate oxidative intermediates that trigger downstream defense/apoptosis pathways.
safetyNotes: Mostly preclinical or source-extract evidence. Isolated-compound safety is not equivalent to food/herb exposure; use caution with pregnancy, liver/kidney disease, and polypharmacy.
dosage: standardized extract or essential-oil-free preparation when oral use is intended
typical_dosage: standardized extract or essential-oil-free preparation when oral use is intended
